research.title: CVE-2026-48558 | SimpleHelp OIDC Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
research.summary: SimpleHelp has released patches for CVE-2026-48558, an authentication bypass vulnerability affecting deployments configured to use OpenID Connect (OIDC) authentication. The issue stems from how SimpleHelp validates identity provider assertions, allowing an.

research.title: What Changed in OWASP Top 10 2025 and Recommendations for Each Category
research.summary: Key Takeaways The 2025 list introduces two new categories – Software Supply Chain Failures (A03) and Mishandling of Exceptional Conditions (A10) – reflecting attacks already happening in production. Security Misconfiguration jumping from #5 to #2 signals.

research.title: Claude Fable 5's pricing makes Sonar Context Augmentation a potent cost lever
research.summary: TL;DR overview Sonar Context Augmentation equips AI coding agents with architectural awareness, intelligent guidelines, semantic navigation, and third-party dependency guidance, ensuring that they possess the relevant context to make the right decisions..

research.title: Zombie COTables: Resurrecting Freed Memory to Escape VirtualBox
research.summary: By Luca Ginex Overview This blog post discusses a use-after-free vulnerability that we found in VirtualBox in 2025. This vulnerability was patched on Oracle Critical Patch Update – January 2026 . The vulnerability was also presented, along with others, at.

vulns.title: Check Point Security Gateway Improper Authentication Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Vulnerability: Logic flow weakness in Remote Access and Mobile Access
vulns.whatBroke: Vulnerability: Logic flow weakness in Remote Access and Mobile Access
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at fevar54/CVE-2026-50751---Check-Point-IKEv1-Authentication-Bypass-Exploit.
vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/fevar54/CVE-2026-50751---Check-Point-IKEv1-Authentication-Bypass-Exploit
cd CVE-2026-50751---Check-Point-IKEv1-Authentication-Bypass-Exploit
python3 <script>.py --target https://<authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: initial access through exposed Security Gateway
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered
vulns.weaponized: Likely worth tracking because public tooling exists and recent source activity was observed.

vulns.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager formerly SD-WAN vManage contains an improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability. This vulnerability could allow an authenticated, local attacker to execute arbitrary commands as root by.
vulns.technicalSummary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager formerly SD-WAN vManage contains an improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability. This vulnerability could allow an authenticated, local attacker to execute arbitrary commands as root by.
